title: Create: Stratus Terra (Forge)
description:
This a vanilla+ style create modpack designed for the Create: Stratus Terra minecraft server.

It is based around the famous create mod and its addons, with each mod contributing to a player-friendly, social experience.
body:
This modpack is no longer active.  
The project however is not dead, you are simply at the wrong modpack.

You are looking for this modpack: https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-stratus-terra
